_provenance: Synthetic input for the new-day reset scenario. Derived from AC-M1F.2.3 (new-day reset wipes triggered=False, first row of new day uses current_return) and AC-M1F.2.4 (resume_shadow_baselines order).
_scenario: New trading day: triggered wiped to False by wipe_transient_state. First row of the day: shadow_return = current_return regardless of previous day's trigger state.

shadow_return.comment: New day: wipe_transient_state cleared triggered. AC-M1F.2.3.
